reviews.comment:
Muy mala ubicación. Tantos años que visito la Villa y no se notan los cambios. Pésimo desarrollo urbanistico. Una estación de Servicio mal ubicada. Los autos que llevan a cargar combustible, van quedando atravesados, obstaculizando el ingreso oeste a la Villa. Hace años, deberían haber invertido en obra pública, calles aledañas rotas... mucho para decir....

(Translated by Google)
Terrible location. I've been visiting the town for so many years and there's no sign of improvement. Awful urban planning. The gas station is badly located. Cars going to refuel end up blocking the road, obstructing the western entrance to the town. They should have invested in public works years ago; the surrounding streets are broken... so much to say...
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1084216927848101404/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN5a2RPQlV3EAE

reviews.comment:
Buena atención. Con todos los servicios. Cafetería. Kiosco. Productos de almacén. Baños de uso público con excelente higiene. Rapidez en el despacho de combustible

(Translated by Google)
Good service. Full amenities. Cafeteria. Kiosk. Convenience store. Public restrooms with excellent hygiene. Fast fuel service.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1084216927848101404/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN5NGVmc1d3EAE

reviews.comment:
Si bien el centro de VLA no es grande, la estación si tendría q serlo, el único ingreso es x la ruta 40,  y si hay q esperar para entrar, se arma mucho embotellamiento

(Translated by Google)
While downtown VLA isn't large, the station should be; the only access is via Route 40, and if there's a wait to get in, it creates a huge traffic jam.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1084216927848101404/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN5aW83dndnRRAB
